title: D-EB-FU-FILE — File 2 EB-handoff FUs + atomic reshape of pre-existing malformed FU + meta.totalCount correction
description: Three-part atomic substrate cleanup + intended forward work on SR .roadmap/follow-up-register.json. (1) Reshape FU-SR-INFRASTRUCTURE-CATALOG-PURPOSE-ENUM-EXTENDED-1 (index 12, added via PR #102) from non-canonical field set (filed/closedAt/closedBy/closingDeliverable/note) to canonical schema (opened/openedDuring/scope/blockedBy/blocks/resolution). Mechanical mapping, zero information loss. (2) Correct meta.totalCount from stale 12 to 15 (covers existing 13 + 2 new appends). (3) Append 2 P1 FUs from EB cross-chat handoff canvas F0B7U37MSDC: FU-SR-RESOURCE-ACCESS-CREDENTIAL-LIVENESS-FIELD-1 + FU-SR-CATALOG-VPC-PEERING-FIELD-1. Single PR per memory #20 enterprise-complete + memory #17 spike-supersedes-novel-pattern semantics — substrate cleanup is one work-unit, scoped atomically. Full canonical ajv re-validation before PR open per discipline established in D-1-CLEANUP earlier today.

outputs.description: Reshape FU-SR-INFRASTRUCTURE-CATALOG-PURPOSE-ENUM-EXTENDED-1 (index 12) to canonical follow-up-register.schema.json field set. Mechanical field mapping: filed (2026-06-03) -> opened (2026-06-03); closedAt (2026-06-03T01:17:21Z) -> resolution.closedDate (2026-06-03, truncated to date format); closingDeliverable -> resolution.closedDuring (augmented with reshape context); closedBy + note -> resolution.summary (merged with reshape provenance recorded). Required missing fields added: openedDuring (derived from existing note text), scope (derived from title + note), blockedBy [] empty, blocks [] empty. id, title, priority, status, trackingRepo preserved exactly.
acceptanceCriteria: FU at index 12 has all canonical required fields: id, title, priority, status, opened, openedDuring, scope, blockedBy, blocks, trackingRepo, resolution
All existing values preserved verbatim where field mapping is identity (id, title, priority, status, trackingRepo)
Date fields use YYYY-MM-DD format (opened=2026-06-03, resolution.closedDate=2026-06-03)
resolution.summary preserves original note text + records reshape provenance
Non-canonical fields removed: filed, closedAt, closedBy, closingDeliverable, note (all migrated to canonical equivalents)
Zero information loss verified via field mapping table

outputs.description: Correct meta.totalCount from 12 to 15. Pre-state: array has 13 entries, totalCount stale at 12. Post-reshape (OUT-1, no count change), 2 appends (OUT-3): final array has 15 entries, totalCount=15.
acceptanceCriteria: meta.totalCount = 15 (matches followUps array length after all OUTs applied)
lastUpdated bumped to 2026-06-02 ISO 8601 timestamp

outputs.description: Append 2 FU entries from EB cross-chat handoff canvas F0B7U37MSDC: FU-SR-RESOURCE-ACCESS-CREDENTIAL-LIVENESS-FIELD-1 (P1 open, livenessProbe field on credentialItem in resource-access.schema.json) and FU-SR-CATALOG-VPC-PEERING-FIELD-1 (P1 open, vpcPeerings[] top-level array on infrastructure-catalog.schema.json). Both ids match schema pattern, no collisions verified chat-sandbox.
acceptanceCriteria: followUps array length 15 (13 existing + 2 new)

Both new FUs have all required canonical fields

Both openedDuring cite EB cross-chat handoff canvas F0B7U37MSDC
No existing FU entries modified beyond OUT-1 reshape

outputs.description: indexes block regenerated reflecting all 15 entries (reshape adjusts FU-SR-INFRASTRUCTURE-CATALOG-PURPOSE-ENUM-EXTENDED-1 status remains closed; two new FUs add P1+open entries to indexes).
acceptanceCriteria: indexes.byStatus.open includes both new FUs
indexes.byStatus.closed includes FU-SR-INFRASTRUCTURE-CATALOG-PURPOSE-ENUM-EXTENDED-1 (status preserved through reshape)
indexes.byPriority.P1 includes both new FUs

outputs.description: Full canonical ajv re-validation before PR open. Confirms zero remaining schema violations across all 15 FUs.

If any FU fails validation, dispatch halts and reports verbatim — no autonomous correction

transitions.trigger: Spec re-authored after substrate-recheck during D-EB-FU-FILE Step 1 revealed pre-existing schema-mismatch in FU at index 12 (added via PR #102 with non-canonical field shape). Per memory #17 spike-supersedes-novel-pattern + memory #20 enterprise-complete: scope expanded to atomic three-part substrate cleanup. Field mapping verified mechanical and lossless against canonical reference index 0. Same Path Z discipline as D-1-CLEANUP earlier today: full re-validation before PR open.
Cross-chat coordination loop closed; substrate atomic; SR-chat posts ack canvas

notes: Atomic deliverable expanding D-EB-FU-FILE scope per Path Z discipline. Original scope: file 2 EB-handoff FUs. Surfaced during Step 1 substrate-recheck: pre-existing index-12 FU is schema-mismatched (added via PR #102 with filed/closedAt/closedBy/closingDeliverable/note instead of canonical opened/openedDuring/scope/blockedBy/blocks/resolution). Plus meta.totalCount stale at 12 (should be 13 pre-fix, 15 post-fix). All three issues fixed atomically in one PR per fortune-500 enterprise atomic-canonical-substrate standard. Meta-observation worth filing next session: roadmap-sync.yml on PR #102 should have caught the schema mismatch and rejected the FU. Either workflow had a gap (path filter, validation invocation) or PR #102 bypassed the check. Not in scope tonight; logged for next-session workflow-hygiene arc. Cross-chat coordination loop closes when SR-chat posts ack canvas to #luhtech-agents-comms (OUT-7, chat-action post-merge).
